name: Source Fidelity review for Operational Practice and Policy Boundary Update bundle
summary: Accepted. All three new sources are full-text verified with locators: New Meridian Standard Processes, Maine Science Assessment Spring 2024 technical report, and Zhang et al. 2026. The staged summaries and findings keep the reported workflows bounded to the source text.

findings.claim_or_issue: New Meridian, Maine, and Zhang et al. are extracted from full text with section/page locators and access attempts.
findings.why_it_matters: Operational and policy-adjacent claims need direct source grounding rather than abstract-only support.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the staged source access metadata, locators, and source-specific limitations.
